description_long: This is a medium-sized artificial Christmas tree with a classic conical shape, featuring dense, dark green plastic needles that mimic the appearance of real pine branches. The branches are arranged in layered tiers, giving the tree a full and bushy look from all sides. The trunk is not visible, as it is covered by the thick foliage, and there are no visible decorations, lights, or ornaments attached to the branches. The tree stands upright and appears to be supported by an internal frame, likely made of metal or sturdy plastic. The surface of the branches has a matte, slightly rough texture, typical of synthetic holiday trees. There are no visible toppers, artificial snow, or gift boxes present at the base.
description: A dense, artificial Christmas tree with dark green plastic needles and a classic conical shape, lacking any decorations or toppers. The tree has a full, bushy appearance and a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical, conical shape and dense green branches with no visible decorations.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the layered structure of the branches and the fullness of the tree's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same dense foliage and conical form, with no visible trunk or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the bushy branches and uniform green color.
